raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX In XXXX, XXXX sent me a collection letter for Citi Bank credit card that I did not open. 
Before the 30-day response time had ran out, XXXX sent me a civil summons XX/XX/XXXX Case XXXX XXXX , Kentucky XXXX I have since sent.

Response to the summons.

Including.
